HomePage.title: GrowthOS
HomePage.subtitle: Multi-vertical growth analytics platform. This is the bootstrap scaffold — features land per the backlog in TASKS.md.

Onboarding.title: Get {projectName} set up
Onboarding.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Onboarding.introBody: Let's connect your first data source and get a board ready to share — this takes about ten minutes.
Onboarding.packStepIntro: Choose a metric pack for your vertical, or start from scratch.
Onboarding.packSaasMarketingDescription: Ad spend, signups, CAC, MRR, and a signup-to-paying funnel.
Onboarding.packCustomDescription: Skip the starter pack — register your own metrics later.
Onboarding.packInstalling: Installing the pack and provisioning its starter boards…
Onboarding.sourceStepIntro: Connect a source plugin, or push your own data with an API key — either way works.
Onboarding.sourceStepNoManifests: No source plugins are registered in this org yet.
Onboarding.sourceStepNoManifestsLink: Register one from the plugin registry
Onboarding.sourceStepNoEnvironments: This project has no environments yet.
Onboarding.sourceStepContinueHint: Connect a source above to continue.
Onboarding.funnelStepIntro: Here's a proposed order for your funnel, based on the events already registered. Reorder, recategorize, or exclude any step, then confirm.
Onboarding.funnelStepEmpty: This project hasn't received any events yet — you can always set this up later once data starts flowing.
Onboarding.boardStepEmpty: No boards yet — that's fine, you can build one anytime.

ApiKeys.touchpointSnippetIntro: Paste this once, right before the closing body tag, on any page you want to track. It captures UTM parameters and ad-click ids at entry and attaches them to every event this key's project registers.
ApiKeys.mcpEndpointIntro: Connect an MCP client (Claude Desktop, claude.ai, or a headless agent) to this project.
ApiKeys.mcpApiKeyIntro: For headless agents: mint a key above with the mcp.read scope and use it as a bearer token.
ApiKeys.mcpConnectionPendingLabel: Approved — waiting for the client to finish connecting
ApiKeys.revokeMcpConnectionError: Couldn't revoke this connection. Please try again.

McpConsent.heading: Connect an MCP client to GrowthOS
McpConsent.description: An MCP client is requesting read access to one of your projects — it will be able to query metrics, cohorts, customer records, and insights on your behalf.
McpConsent.noEligibleProjects: You don't have MCP read access to any project yet. Ask a project admin to grant you a role with mcp.read.
McpConsent.scopeReadDescription: Read metrics, cohorts, customers, and insights
McpConsent.invalidRequest: This authorization request is invalid, expired, or was already used.
McpConsent.consentError: Something went wrong approving this connection. Please try again.
